revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: remove obsolete category Historical articles needing translation from Polish Wikipedia
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_Polish here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_Polish for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Expand language
|langcode=pl
|section={{{section|}}}
|otherarticle={{{1|}}}
|date={{{date|}}}
|fa={{{fa|}}}
|topic={{#switch: {{{topic}}}
 | bio = Biography
 | geo = Geography
 | gov = Government and politics
 | cult 
 | culture = Culture
 | hist = History
 | mil= Military
 | sci | tech | scitech = Science and technology
 | sport = Sports
 | transp | transport = Transport
 | struct = Building and structure
}}
|nodoc={{{nodoc|}}}
|set={{{1|}}}
|no interwiki={{{no interwiki|}}}
}}
}}<noinclude>

== TemplateData ==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Title",
			"description": "Title of the article on Polish Wikipedia",
			"example": "Rzymski dyplom wojskowy",
			"type": "wiki-page-name",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		},
		"date": {
			"label": "Date",
			"description": "Current date (month and year)",
			"example": "April 2016",
			"type": "date",
			"autovalue": "05 2025",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		},
		"fa": {
			"label": "Featured",
			"description": "Is the article in Polish Featured (does it have Artykuł na Medal status?)",
			"example": "yes",
			"type": "boolean",
			"autovalue": "yes",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"section": {
			"label": "Section",
			"description": "If set to 'yes', emits text, 'This section...' instead of, 'This article.')",
			"example": "yes",
			"type": "boolean",
			"autovalue": "yes",
			"autovalue": ""
		},
		"topic": {
			"label": "Category",
			"description": "If set, the value of the parameter would become a name of a Category this article would be placed in. For instance setting it to \"Historical\" would place the article in the ",
			"example": "Historical",
			"type": "content",
			"autovalue": ""
		}
	},
	"description": "Template adds a boilerplate informing that the article could be expanded using information published in the corresponding article of Polish Wikipedia.",
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
